definitions: n. 发掘 (指对文物/遗迹的系统性挖掘)

examples.text: M) Pritchett concedes that his find deserves careful excavation and preservation.
examples.explanation: 普里切特承认他的发现值得进行细致的发掘与保护。

examples.text: “Archaeology has a terrible reputation for not publishing enough on its excavations (发掘) and finds,” he says.
examples.explanation: 他说：‘考古学因未能充分发表其发掘成果和发现而声誉不佳。’
